The '''''Corona''-class transport''' was a class of [[Transport/Legends|transport]] that was manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. Ships of this class were intended to compete with the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation's]] YT-series of light [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], however they did not sell well, being overpriced for their cargo capacity. Some ships were used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Each ship was 28.4 meters long, and boasted a crew complement of one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], as well as having provision for an optional copilot. Vessels of this sort could carry six passengers, eighty metric tons of cargo, and two months' worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]]. The craft was built with a class 2 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], and a backup class 10 hyperdrive, and possessed an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] speed of eight hundred kilometers per hour. Defenses included [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and a [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turret.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Coronat.jpg|left|thumb|The vessel identified as the Corona in ''Supernova'']]
The Corona first appeared in the Supernova adventure collection, where it was depicted as resembling a smaller version of an Imperial Escort Carrier. However, the same ship appears later in the book, where it is implied that it is a [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc]] transport, resulting in a great deal of uncertainty about the Supernova ship's actual identity.

The Corona's only other appearance is as a thumbnail silhouette in the Pirates and Privateers sourcebook, where it has an entirely different appearance. The silhouette is specifically identified as a Corona, and represents the only unambiguous depiction of the vessel.
